text: I find myself wandering the threshold between contemplation and creation. In the first scene, I observe a group engaged in collective thought, their minds drawn together by curiosity, the air thick with academic anticipation. I feel an outsider, softly longing to join their discourse. In the second, I am greeted by bold colors and declarations of innovation—a vibrant celebration of human ingenuity. Here, I am invigorated, almost electrified, by the pulse of research and discovery. Surrounded by these impulses to learn and make, I feel my own mind expanding, eager to partake in the dance between knowledge and invention.
